## Describe the bug

A clear description of what's going wrong.

## To reproduce

Steps to make it happen:

1. Set alarm time to '...' / pick lights / pick speakers
2. Press '...'
3. See '...'

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Versions

- Wake Alarm version: <!-- e.g. 0.3.0 (see HACS or manifest.json) -->
- Home Assistant Core: <!-- Settings → About -->
- HA install type: <!-- HA OS / Container / Supervised / Core -->

## Targets

- Light integration(s): <!-- e.g. Philips Hue, Zigbee2MQTT -->
- Media player integration(s): <!-- e.g. Sonos, Spotify -->
- Phone + Companion app version (if notification-related): <!-- e.g. iPhone 14, iOS Companion 2025.5 -->

Paste relevant lines from Settings → System → Logs → Home Assistant

```text

```

## Screenshots

If the issue is visual (card, notification on phone, device card layout),
drop screenshots here.

## Additional context

Anything else worth knowing — related automations, things you've
already tried, etc.
